name: @zirkeldesign/privacy-captcha-for-cap
description: Build tooling to bundle the cap-widget and WASM assets for the WordPress plugin.

scripts.translate: bun run translate:pot && bun run translate:update && bun run translate:mo
scripts.translate:update: for file in ./languages/*.po; do wp i18n update-po ./languages/privacy-captcha-for-cap.pot "$file"; done
